description: Use this API routine to change the status of induction machines that are in-service, but that have been set to the “stalled” (for motors) or “tripped” (for generators) state by the power flow solution, to out-of-service. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = imoutage(sid, all, motopt, genopt)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

all.description: process only induction machines in subsystem SID.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
